delegate-with-mission-cards: Mission Control for bounded multi-agent work. Gate delegation, select the lightest capable reader or writer, issue scoped mission cards, run safe parallel waves, and independently verify every handoff. The full toolkit installer also provides Luna, Terra, and Sol custom-agent roles.
repository-intelligence: Evidence-backed architecture, ownership, dependency, hotspot, change-impact, and edit-conflict mapping.
multi-agent-work-coordinator: Safe repository work graphs with exclusive write ownership, dependency waves, integration order, and handoff verification.
codebase-evolution-controller: Dependency, framework, schema, and API evolution with compatibility stages, rollout, rollback, and evidence.
verification-and-release: Risk-based test strategy and evidence-backed release readiness decisions.
debugging-investigator: Reproduction-first debugging with ranked hypotheses, causal tracing, minimal fixes, and regression design.
documentation-synchronizer: Code-to-documentation drift detection and synchronized user, developer, API, configuration, migration, and operations updates.
product-design-director: Product UX and visual direction, brand extraction, responsive systems, accessibility, redesign audits, and taste calibration.
screenshot-to-interface: Maintainable reconstruction from screenshots with structural analysis, asset handling, responsive inference, accessibility, and visual fidelity loops.
production-web-builder: Production web architecture and implementation across data, forms, motion, accessibility, performance, testing, observability, SEO, and browser verification.
mobile-architecture-director: Evidence-based selection among Flutter, Expo/React Native, native, and other mobile approaches.
flutter-production-builder: Production Flutter architecture and implementation across state, routing, data, offline, platform integration, testing, performance, and release.
expo-react-native-builder: Production Expo/React Native architecture and implementation across routing, builds, updates, native modules, data, offline, testing, performance, and stores.
